arts.ttl: 'He was phenomenal': Mikel Arteta left completely blown away by 'unbelievable' Arsenal star vs Tottenham
Declan Rice rubs salt in Tottenham wounds with brutal verdict on Arsenal win
arts.sum: Declan Rice was frustrated Arsenal couldn't add to their tally in their north London derby win as the Gunners continued to find ways through the Tottenham defence
Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta says his side were "outstanding" against Tottenham as they moved to within four points of Premier League leaders Liverpool with victory in the north London derby.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice believes Arsenal were 'unlucky not to score TEN' against Tottenham - after Gunners' comeback win moved them to within four points of the Premier League leaders
arts.sum: Declan Rice believes that Arsenal should have handed Tottenham a historic hiding, given the number of chances they created against their north London rivals.

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney has Ally McCoist raving about vital new Arsenal role as blown away fans all say the same thing
arts.sum: The defender is in talks over a stunning return to Celtic but was thrown on in an unfamiliar position against Spurs

arts.ttl: 'I think': Rio Ferdinand delivers his verdict on Raheem Sterling’s performance for Arsenal vs Tottenham
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling was handed a rare start in Arsenal’s North London Derby win against Tottenham Hotspur on Wednesday evening. Mikel Arteta’s Arsenal side started well,...

arts.ttl: Dawson: Ange will be 'raging' with Arsenal's second goal in NLD
arts.sum: Sky Sports News' Michael Dawson says Spurs boss Ange Postecoglou will be fuming over the way his side conceded Arsenal's second goal in their 2-1 North London Derby defeat.

arts.ttl: How Arsenal’s horror week set up vital derby win over Tottenham
arts.sum: Arsenal 2-1 Tottenham: The Gunners’ flaws are still evident but they kept their Premier League title hopes alive in an entertainingly chaotic north London derby

arts.ttl: Rice says Arsenal ‘should have scored 10’ against Spurs
arts.sum: Declan Rice has said Arsenal ‘should have scored 10’ after dominating Tottenham in the North London derby. Arsenal moved up to second in the Premier League table – and within four points of leaders Liverpool – after a 2-1 win over Spurs at the Emirates. Mikel Arteta’s team were good value for their win but […] The post Rice says Arsenal ‘should have scored 10’ against Spurs first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals why he is 'worried' ahead of Southampton clash as he fires warning to Man United stars - despite positive results against Liverpool and Arsenal
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER:Ruben Amorim has warned his Manchester United players that he will learn more about them against bottom-of-the-table Southampton than in previous games.
